name: Radiance Renewal Serum
shortDesc: A potent vitamin C complex that brightens, firms, and restores youthful luminosity.
fullDesc: Our signature Radiance Renewal Serum combines stabilized vitamin C with ferulic acid and vitamin E to deliver clinically proven brightening results. This lightweight serum absorbs instantly to visibly reduce fine lines, improve skin texture, and restore a vibrant, youthful glow. Perfect for all skin types.
benefits: Reduces appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
usage: Apply 2-3 drops to clean, dry face and neck in the morning. Follow with moisturizer and SPF. For best results, use twice daily.
ingredients: Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C 15%), Ferulic Acid, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera Extract

name: Hydra Barrier Cream
shortDesc: Deep hydration with ceramides and hyaluronic acid to strengthen your skin's natural barrier.
fullDesc: Formulated with a unique blend of ceramides, hyaluronic acid, and niacinamide, this luxurious cream provides intense hydration while reinforcing your skin's protective barrier. Suitable for all skin types, especially dry and sensitive skin.
usage: Apply a generous amount to clean, damp face and neck. Gently massage until fully absorbed. Use morning and evening.
ingredients: Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), Centella Asiatica Extract, Glycerin

name: Pure Clarity Cleanser
shortDesc: Gentle yet effective gel cleanser that purifies without stripping essential moisture.
fullDesc: This pH-balanced gel cleanser gently removes makeup, oil, and impurities without disrupting your skin's natural pH or stripping away essential moisture. Infused with botanical extracts for a refreshing clean that leaves skin soft and supple.
usage: Wet face with lukewarm water. Apply a dime-sized amount to hands, lather gently, and massage onto face for 30-60 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily.
ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Tea Tree Extract, Chamomile Extract, Aloe Vera Leaf Juice, Panthenol

name: Botanical Essence
shortDesc: Lightweight plant-powered essence that preps skin and delivers an instant hydration boost.
fullDesc: A delicate blend of botanical extracts including green tea, rose water, and ginseng, this essence prepares your skin for better absorption of subsequent products while delivering instant hydration and a natural glow.
benefits: Preps skin for better product absorption
usage: After cleansing, dispense 3-4 drops onto clean hands or a cotton pad. Gently pat onto face and neck, allowing to absorb. Use morning and evening before serum and moisturizer.
ingredients: Rose Water, Green Tea Extract, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Witch Hazel Extract

name: Overnight Recovery Mask
shortDesc: Intensive peptide treatment that works while you sleep to repair and rejuvenate tired skin.
fullDesc: This innovative overnight mask combines peptides, retinol, and botanical extracts to repair, brighten, and rejuvenate your skin while you sleep. Wake up to visibly smoother, more radiant skin with improved texture and firmness.
usage: Apply a generous layer to clean face and neck before bedtime. Leave on overnight (7-8 hours). Rinse with lukewarm water in the morning. Use 3-4 times per week.
ingredients: Peptide Complex, Retinol 0.3%, Jasmine Extract, Lavender Oil, Squalane, Ceramide Complex

name: Complete Ritual Set
shortDesc: Our full three-step routine in travel-friendly sizes — cleanse, treat, and moisturize.
fullDesc: The perfect introduction to Zerona Derma or a gift for skincare enthusiasts. This set includes our bestselling cleanser, serum, and moisturizer in convenient travel sizes, giving you a complete skincare ritual wherever you go.
usage: Use as a complete morning and evening routine: Cleanse with Pure Clarity Cleanser, apply Radiance Renewal Serum, and finish with Hydra Barrier Cream.
ingredients: See individual product pages for detailed ingredient lists

name: Retinol Renewal Cream
shortDesc: Advanced retinol formula that smooths, brightens, and reduces visible signs of aging.
fullDesc: Our professional-grade retinol cream delivers powerful anti-aging benefits with time-released retinol technology that minimizes irritation while maximizing results. Clinically proven to reduce wrinkles, improve firmness, and enhance overall skin texture.
benefits: Reduces fine lines and deep wrinkles
usage: Begin 2-3 times per week in the evening on clean, dry skin. Use pea-sized amount. Gradually increase frequency as skin builds tolerance. Always use SPF 30+ during the day.
ingredients: Retinol 0.5%, Squalane, Peptide Complex, Ceramide NP, Niacinamide, Jojoba Oil

name: Exfoliating Enzyme Powder
shortDesc: Gentle physical exfoliant with natural enzymes for smooth, radiant skin without irritation.
fullDesc: This innovative powder exfoliant uses natural fruit enzymes and fine particles to gently remove dead skin cells without harsh scrubbing. Mix with water to create a creamy paste that leaves skin smooth, refined, and luminous.
usage: Mix 1 teaspoon powder with a small amount of water to form a paste. Gently massage onto clean, damp face using circular motions for 1-2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly. Use 2-3 times per week.
ingredients: Papaya Enzyme, Pumpkin Powder, Fine Bamboo Particles, Oat Extract, Chamomile Extract, Aloe Vera

name: Youth Eye Contour Serum
shortDesc: Specialized serum targeting fine lines, puffiness, and dark circles around delicate eye area.
fullDesc: Formulated specifically for the delicate eye area, this lightweight serum combines caffeine, peptides, and hydrating ingredients to target fine lines, reduce puffiness, and minimize dark circles. Results visible in just 2 weeks.
benefits: Reduces fine lines and crow's feet
Strengthens and lifts skin around eyes
usage: Apply a small amount around eye area morning and evening. Gently tap with ring finger until absorbed. Do not apply directly on eyelid. Avoid contact with eyes.
ingredients: Caffeine, Peptide Complex, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin K, Arnica Extract, Panthenol

name: Skin Barrier Serum
shortDesc: Calming serum that repairs and strengthens compromised skin barriers.
fullDesc: Specifically designed for sensitive and reactive skin, this barrier-repair serum combines ceramides, panthenol, and soothing botanical extracts to restore skin's protective function and reduce irritation.
usage: Apply to clean skin morning and evening. Use 2-3 drops, gently patting until absorbed. Can be used under or mixed with moisturizer.
ingredients: Ceramide Complex, Panthenol, Centella Asiatica Extract, Beta-Glucan, Allantoin, Glycerin

name: Hyaluronic Hydration Toner
shortDesc: Lightweight hydrating toner that plumps skin and prepares it for serums.
fullDesc: This alcohol-free toner is packed with hyaluronic acid and niacinamide to hydrate, balance pH, and prepare skin for maximum absorption of treatments. Leaves skin feeling refreshed, plump, and ready for serums.
usage: After cleansing, apply to face and neck with a cotton pad or by gently patting with hands. Allow to absorb before applying serum or moisturizer. Use morning and evening.
ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), Glycerin, Allantoin, Centella Asiatica Extract, Rose Water

name: Squalane Oil Supplement
shortDesc: Lightweight, non-comedogenic oil that hydrates without heaviness.
fullDesc: Plant-derived squalane mimics skin's natural oils perfectly. This lightweight supplement can be used alone, mixed with moisturizer, or added to serums for customizable hydration without clogging pores.
usage: Apply 1-2 drops to face morning or evening. Can be used alone or mixed with other products. Adjust amount based on skin needs.
ingredients: Plant-derived Squalane 99%+, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Natural Antioxidants

name: Brightening Vitamin C Mask
shortDesc: Intensive weekly treatment that brightens, firms, and boosts radiance instantly.
fullDesc: This creamy wash-off mask combines stabilized vitamin C with antioxidants and peptides for an intensive weekly brightening treatment. Visible results in just 15 minutes, with lasting improvements over time.
usage: Apply even layer to clean face, avoiding eyes and lips. Leave on for 10-15 minutes. Rinse with lukewarm water. Use once weekly for best results.
ingredients: Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C 10%), Peptide Complex, Gold Particle Extract, Kaolin Clay, Glycerin, Ginseng Extract

name: Peptide Firming Neck Serum
shortDesc: Specialized serum that targets neck and décolletage for lifted, firm appearance.
fullDesc: Often neglected, the neck area shows signs of aging first. This targeted serum combines potent peptides, retinol, and firming botanicals to lift, tighten, and improve skin texture on the neck and décolletage.
usage: Apply to clean neck and décolletage, gently stroking upward. Use morning and evening. Allow to dry before applying other products.
ingredients: Peptide Complex, Retinol 0.3%, Horsetail Extract, Caffeine, Hyaluronic Acid, Squalane

name: Sunscreen SPF 50
shortDesc: Lightweight, non-greasy broad-spectrum SPF 50 for daily protection.
fullDesc: This ultra-lightweight sunscreen provides broad-spectrum protection against UVA/UVB rays without leaving a white cast or heavy residue. Water-resistant formula that doesn't interfere with makeup.
usage: Apply generously to face and neck 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours or after swimming. Use daily year-round.
ingredients: Zinc Oxide 15%, Titanium Dioxide 5%, Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera Extract, Vitamin E, Centella Asiatica

name: Cellular Renewal Complex
shortDesc: Advanced treatment that stimulates cellular turnover and promotes skin regeneration.
fullDesc: Our most advanced formula combines stem cell technology, peptides, and restorative botanicals to deeply stimulate cellular renewal and regeneration. The result is visibly younger, healthier-looking skin.
usage: Apply 2-3 drops to clean face and neck morning and evening. Gently massage until absorbed. Can be used before or after serum. Avoid eye area.
ingredients: Stem Cell Extract, Peptide Complex, Restorative Botanicals, Hyaluronic Acid, Squalane, Panthenol
